working_on.feature: User guide update and OneFile packaging
working_on.notes: Updated GUI guide text to cover source_file_order.xlsx, OneFile folder layout, manual headcount/events, Dashboard, errors, and operating recommendations. package_app.py now uses python -m PyInstaller and copies docs/MP2027 to dist/docs/MP2027.

pending_tasks.task: Collect real event driver data for JP/VN bus, no-trip gift, My Episode, 10-year events, company anniversary, and VISA/Passport rows if not row 137.
Collect/confirm manual headcount by CC/month, especially December male/female split for health-check rows 57/58.
Manually validate GUI layout in a real Windows Tkinter session after the Vietnamese UX changes.
If finance requires output for CCs with zero fact data, revisit batch-export selection that currently exports only CCs with account_code > 0 data.

recent_changes.description: Vietnamese-localized visible GUI labels except Dashboard; improved Dashboard kiểm toán with XANH/VÀNG/ĐỎ legend, row coloring, missing-input table, and formula preview.
Expanded Nhập sự kiện thiếu dữ liệu with why-this-is-needed text, 7-step instructions, event-specific hints, and Vietnamese labels.
Updated user-facing usage docs to match current workflow: FORM MP2027, manual data entry, Dashboard audit, and no fabricated numbers.
Ran py_compile for src/universal_app.py and unit tests: tests.test_src_v2_logic, tests.test_posting_month_logic, tests.test_headcount_and_export; 23 tests OK.

decisions_made.decision: Treat docs/MP2027 as the only authoritative runtime source bundle
decisions_made.reason: The root-form/template set is older and contains stale sample formulas in rows that can pollute output.

decisions_made.decision: Use manual_special_costs.csv for NNN event costs rather than synthesizing them from headcount rules
decisions_made.reason: The requirement sheet describes an event-totaling workflow, not a headcount-driven allocation.

decisions_made.decision: Mark the remaining gaps as data blockers instead of open coding defects
decisions_made.reason: The engine can already accept the missing inputs once the user supplies them.

decisions_made.decision: Keep facility electric and water as numeric output until monthly quantity/unit-price detail is available
decisions_made.reason: The current facility source provides only final monthly amounts, so any Excel-side formula would be invented rather than traceable to workbook inputs.

errors_encountered.error: PowerShell/CP932 UnicodeEncodeError occurred when printing Vietnamese test/log output earlier.
errors_encountered.resolution: Removed unnecessary test prints and added safe console logging for run_e2e; keep file contents UTF-8.

errors_encountered.error: Initial apply_patch for USER_GUIDE_TEXT failed due to stale context/duplicate guide block.
errors_encountered.resolution: Removed duplicate old guide block and kept one current Vietnamese guide source.

context_checkpoints: Current workspace has many code/docs/output/db changes; do not revert user or generated changes without approval.
Latest verified commands: py -m py_compile src\universal_app.py; py -m unittest tests.test_src_v2_logic tests.test_posting_month_logic tests.test_headcount_and_export.
Do not convert internal data/schema keys like staff, worker, row, form_row, cc_code; only visible UI text is Vietnamese-first.
